arts.ttl: Report: Tottenham could now compete with Chelsea for “very complete” title-winner
arts.sum: South Korean defender Kim Min-jae has been linked with a move away from Bayern Munich during the summer transfer window. The 28-year-old central defender has attracted interest from Tottenham Hotspur and Chelsea, as per CFBayernInsider. It will be interesting to see if the two Premier League clubs are willing to come forward with an offer […] The post Report: Tottenham could now compete with Chelsea for “very complete” title-winner appeared first on The Boy Hotspur.
